card.name: Momentuum: 0 - The Fool
card.description: Is this you?

card.name: Momentuum: I - The Magician
card.description: I shall play the greatest trick of all.

card.name: Momentuum: II - The High Priestess
card.description: I shall find peace in faith.

card.name: Momentuum: III - The Empress
card.description: I shall endure any loss.

card.name: Momentuum: IV - The Emperor
card.description: I shall choose my opponent.

card.name: Momentuum: V - The Hierophant
card.description: I shall unite body and soul.

card.name: Momentuum: VI - The Lovers
card.description: I shall find my true love.

card.name: Momentuum: VII - The Chariot
card.description: I shall ram all my obstacles.

card.name: Momentuum: VIII - Justice
card.description: I shall be the ultimate judge of fate.

card.name: Momentuum: IX - The Hermit
card.description: I shall become back my money.

card.name: Momentuum: X - Wheel of Fortune
card.description: I shall win in any odds.

card.name: Momentuum: XI - Strength
card.description: I shall become the strongest

card.name: Momentuum: XII - The Hanged Man
card.description: I shall try again and again and again.

card.name: Momentuum: XIII - Death
card.description: I shall become Nihility, the end of all

card.name: Momentuum: XIV - Temperance
card.description: I would really like an apple right now.

card.name: Momentuum: XV - The Devil
card.description: I shall find joy in sin.

card.name: Momentuum: XVII - The Stars
card.description: I shall see a rising star.

card.name: Momentuum: XVIII - The Moon
card.description: I shall see the universal secrets.

card.name: Momentuum: XIX - The Sun
card.description: I shall set the world ablaze.

card.name: Momentuum: XX - Judgement
card.description: I shall prove myself to the world.

card.name: Momentuum: XXI - The World
card.description: I shall see far and beyond.
